about.title: About Me
about.content: I am a Software Engineer focused on architecting high-performance security infrastructure, enterprise-scale automation, and building impactful Android applications. My expertise lies in integrating complex, disparate ecosystems into streamlined workflows that transform manual governance into autonomous systems. Currently, I specialize in automating Identity & Access Management (IAM) lifecycles and leveraging AI to solve high-volume operational challenges, bridging the gap between robust security foundations and scalable product delivery. A Computer Science graduate from Dayananda Sagar College of Engineering, I am dedicated to solving real-world problems with engineering precision—whether that means orchestrating secure data pipelines with Python and Go, or crafting intuitive, performance-driven mobile experiences for Android.

highlights: Architecting enterprise-grade security automation and unified governance platforms for complex organizational ecosystems.
Automating global access lifecycle workflows and governance reviews across disparate SaaS and infrastructure environments.
Pioneering AI-driven initiatives to streamline internal operations and automate mission-critical support-to-solution pipelines.
Developed high-impact automation platforms for enterprise compliance and organizational access governance.
Engineered custom integration services to bridge the gap between security management tools and diverse SaaS platforms.
Implemented automated anomaly detection services to identify and resolve cross-system architectural discrepancies.

work.title: TeaMind
work.description: A minimal, performance-focused Android app for task and habit optimization. Features custom recurrence logic, granular reminder scheduling, and an intuitive drag-and-drop/swipe-based interface.
